build.buildCommand: npm run build && mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache,testing} storage/logs bootstrap/cache && chmod -R a+rw storage && php artisan config:cache && php artisan event:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache

deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan db:seed --force && php artisan storage:link --force && (php artisan queue:work --tries=3 --timeout=90 &) && (php artisan backup:run --disable-notifications || true) && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
